basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Staff Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on the official website actrec.gov.in. A recruitment notification has been announced through the TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 for Staff Nurse posts on a contract basis.

age_limit.details: Staff Nurse: Maximum age limit is 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Nursing) with one year clinical experience.
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: General Nursing and Midwifery and / OR B.Sc. (Nursing) with preferably one year clinical experience. Candidates should have a valid Maharashtra Nursing Council (MNC) Registration certificate. Hepatitis 'B' Vaccination (all doses) Certificate is compulsory.

salary_details.staff nurse (experience): Additional Rs. 1,500/- (Rupees One Thousand Five Hundred only) for every completed year of experience.
